title: The Sick Industrial Companies (Special Provisions) Repeal Act, 2003
full_text: The Sick Industrial Companies (Special Provisions) Repeal Act, 2003 रुग्ण औद्योगिक कंपनी (विशेष उपबंध) निरसन अधिनियम, 2003 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200401 Act Number: 01 Enactment Date: 2004-01-01 Act Year: 2004 Short Title: The Sick Industrial Companies (Special Provisions) Repeal Act, 2003 Hindi Title: रुग्ण औद्योगिक कंपनी (विशेष उपबंध) निरसन अधिनियम, 2003 Long Title: An Act to repeal the Sick Industrial Companies (Special Provisions) Act, 1985. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Financial Services Enforcement Date: 01-12-2016 Notification: 1st December, 2016, vide notification No. S.O. 3568(E), dated 25th November, 2016, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Section 3. Repeal of Act 1 of 1986 and dissolution of Appellate Authority and Board. Section 4. Consequential provisions. Section 5. Saving. Section 6. Power to make rules.
